body.summary: The user called BrightSmile Dental concerned about black dots on their teeth and booked a dental exam appointment for Tuesday, June 23rd at 2 PM. The agent confirmed the booking details, collected the user's name and phone number, and provided the clinic address and parking information.
body.transcript:
bot:Thanks for calling BrightSmile Dental, this is Jessica. How can I help you today — are you looking to book an appointment, or do you have a question about our services?
human:Actually, I can see my teeth having some black dots, and I'm really worried because I want my teeth to always look bright and clean and white. So I wanted to come in for an inspection. 
bot:Got it, I understand how concerning that can be. Let’s get you scheduled for a dental exam so the dentist can take a closer look and figure out what’s going on. When would you prefer to come in? We’re open Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM.
human:Let's book it for Tuesday, two PM. 
bot:Alright, let me check. We can book you for Tuesday, June 23rd, at 2 PM. Could I have your full name to reserve the appointment?
human:My name is Dibesh Rathore. 
bot:Thank you, Dibesh. Could I get your best contact number or email to confirm the appointment?
human:Yeah. Seven nine eight seven two one five seven two eight. 
bot:Got it. So, Dibesh Rathore, I’ve booked you for a dental exam on Tuesday, June 23rd, at 2 PM. Your contact number is seven nine eight seven two one five seven two eight. Does everything look correct?
human:Yeah. Can you also share the address? 
bot:Of course! We’re located at one one four west one twenty-fourth street, New York, New York, one zero zero two seven. Let me know if you need anything else!
human:Do you also have parking? 
bot:We don’t have dedicated parking, but there’s usually street parking available nearby. Let me know if you need help with anything else!
human:No. Thank you. 
bot:You're welcome, Dibesh! Your appointment is all set for Tuesday at 2 PM. Have a great day, and we’ll see you then!
